title: arenaria ciliata var. subuniflora
intro: Arenaria ciliata var. subuniflora, also known as lesser unstalked sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Arenaria ciliata var. subuniflora include reducing inflammation and preventing infection, making it a potential remedy for various skin conditions and injuries. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil, and it is also used in some herbal teas and tinctures.
